unit.note: F0 full shared/tests suite green; +66 in the affected guard/wiring/action surface incl. a real-diff-cover gate-bites test

surface_verification.justification: CI infrastructure: routes the monorepo's own HARD diff-coverage gate through the shared composite action (local ./ path) + teaches the CI-gate guard to see the action uses: step. No app runtime surface (Backend-affects-Frontend N/A). Verified by 66 guard+wiring+action tests incl. TestRealRepo and a committed real-diff-cover gate-bites test; this PR's own python-checks CI run is the live end-to-end proof.

behaviors.behavior: ci.yml gate uses ./.github/actions/diff-coverage-gate + coverage-files: coverage.xml, no continue-on-error, if:hashFiles, no inline measure_diff_coverage.py
Combine still runs before the gate step
guard classifies the action uses: step as a gate (GATE_USES)
continue-on-error on the action gate -> loose (reverse-drift caught)
the refactored LIVE ci.yml passes the guard (no loose gates, no stale allowlist)
the action's real diff-cover@10.3.0 --fail-under=80 gate BITES (covered->exit0, <80%->non-zero) — the decision the hard gate rests on
behaviors.evidence: test_diff_coverage_action_gate_bites.py (executes extracted run body with REAL diff-cover, 2 params PASSED)

behaviors.behavior: the local ./ action path resolves on the fetch-depth:0 checkout in the python-checks job
behaviors.reason: local-path resolution is a GitHub-Actions mechanism exercised by THIS PR's own python-checks CI run; the gate logic itself is proven by the gate-bites test above
